technical_replicate: measurements were made in technical triplicates and three independent biological replicates.
experimental_design: we performed plasmid stability assays using a previously described two-plasmid system.
factor_value: ParAF Q351H and ParAF W362E acts as super-repressors.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_samples: Since no distinct biological replicates are identified.
